justification: The diff correctly updates Spring Boot to 3.x and Java to 21, migrating javax.servlet to jakarta.servlet and using String.formatted() (line 48 in DataController.java). However, it introduces spurious churn by removing the main application class annotations (SpringBootApplication, SpringApplication.run) in HivereaderApplication.java, which would break the app. It also adds redundant JUnit dependencies and removes spring-boot-starter-jdbc without clear justification.
